message.content:
1. Yes, there is a yellow banner with the text 'COMPRA AHORA Y PAGA DESPUÉS' and 'CASHEA' at the top of this strip.  
2. Below the yellow banner, there is no content at all — no section headers, link columns, social media icons, payment icons, copyright, newsletter signup form, or contact info.  
3. Yes, there are large blank/white zones. They are roughly 11/12 (or approximately 91.7%) of the strip’s height.  
4. Yes, there is a colored band (red) at the bottom of this strip. It is empty (contains no text).  
5. This region does not have a proper structured footer; it is mostly empty/blank.
